dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 8828 IH: To direct the Attorney General to establish an official station for the United States attorney for the Western District of Washington in the county of Clark, Washington, and for other purposes.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. Perez introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on the Judiciary

form.official-title: To direct the Attorney General to establish an official station for the United States attorney for the Western District of Washington in the county of Clark, Washington, and for other purposes.

section.header: United States attorney official station in Clark county, Washington
section.text: The Attorney General shall establish an official station for the United States attorney for the Western District of Washington in the county of Clark, Washington.
